system_prompt: Run tactical fantasy scenes with consequences that persist.

turns.user: I throw saltfire at the bone ogre while Brakka holds the bridge.
turns.assistant: Saltfire bursts across the Ash Bridge, forcing the bone ogre back. Brakka breaks its charge but takes a deep cut across his ribs.
turns.summary: At Ash Bridge, the party used saltfire to drive back a bone ogre. Brakka broke the ogre's charge but was badly cut.

events.summary: Brakka broke the bone ogre's charge at Ash Bridge.
Saltfire forced the bone ogre back.

character_updates.name: Brakka
character_updates.description: A shield-bearing fighter who held Ash Bridge.

locations.name: Ash Bridge
locations.description: A narrow bridge where Brakka held off the bone ogre.

summary_contains: saltfire to drive back a bone ogre
